8+ Core Services
What I Do

Services

Core services designed to give you back your time and keep your business running smoothly.

01
📥

Inbox Management

Keeping your inbox organized, responsive, and completely clutter-free — so nothing important slips through the cracks.

  • Monitor incoming emails consistently throughout the day
  • Sort and prioritize emails by urgency and category
  • Respond to emails using pre-approved templates
  • Create and maintain folders to categorize emails
02
📅

Calendar Management

Ensuring your schedule is structured, conflict-free, and always up to date — protecting your time and priorities.

  • Schedule, reschedule, and cancel appointments
  • Send reminders for upcoming meetings and deadlines
  • Coordinate availability across multiple time zones
  • Block time for focused work and key priorities
03
📊

Proposal & Pitch Deck Preparation

Crafting compelling documents that win partnerships and collaborations — tailored, polished, and purpose-built.

  • Draft tailored proposals for potential partners
  • Design and structure pitch decks for collaboration
  • Research the target audience before drafting
  • Revise and refine documents based on feedback
04
🔍

Research

Delivering clear, actionable insights to inform smarter decisions — organized, reliable, and ready to act on.

  • Conduct competitor analysis and benchmarking
  • Track and summarize relevant market trends
  • Research specific topics as requested
  • Compile findings into organized, easy-to-read reports
05
🤝

Communication & Stakeholder Management

Serving as the professional bridge between you and your network — accurate, timely, and relationship-preserving.

  • Manage communication between clients, customers, and partners
  • Follow up on pending responses and action items
  • Relay information accurately and professionally
  • Maintain positive relationships on your behalf
06
📱

Social Media Management

Growing your online presence through platform-specific strategy and posting consistency that builds real account growth.

  • Develop platform-specific content strategies
  • Build and maintain monthly content calendars
  • Create and schedule daily posts across all platforms
  • Monitor engagement and adjust strategy for growth
07
🗂️

Project Management

Keeping projects on track from kickoff to completion — coordinated, flagged early, and delivered on time.

  • Break down projects into tasks and set timelines
  • Coordinate team members and assign responsibilities
  • Track progress and flag blockers early
  • Provide status updates and ensure deadlines are met
08
🗃️

Data Entry

Maintaining accurate, well-organized records and databases — clean, consistent, and always easy to retrieve.

  • Input data accurately into spreadsheets or systems
  • Review and clean existing data for errors
  • Organize and update databases as needed
  • Ensure data is consistently formatted and retrievable
Proof of Work

Portfolio

Real systems built and managed — each one a live example of the work I deliver.

Google Calendar
01 / 07
Calendar Management System
A fully structured weekly schedule built in Google Calendar, featuring color-coded event categories including Admin Tasks, Coaching Calls, Deep Work sessions, Lunch blocks, and a Podcast Session. Time zones are coordinated and recurring blocks are set to protect focused work time daily — from 8 AM Admin through afternoon deep work and client calls.
Gmail
02 / 07
Inbox Management System
A Gmail inbox organized with custom labels including Banking, Job Alerts, and Subscription/Newsletters. Emails are sorted by urgency and category, with color-coded priority labels applied. The inbox is kept at inbox-zero discipline, with starred and snoozed items managed and drafts maintained — keeping 3,736+ emails processed and organized.
Notion
03 / 07
Content Calendar
A Notion Content Calendar tracking YouTube, TikTok, and Instagram content ideas with Film Date, Platform, and Progress status (New Idea → Outlining → Filming). Includes Quick Grabs, platform links, script templates, and a Kanban-style progress board for full content pipeline visibility.
Airtable
04 / 07
CRM Management
CoachFlow CRM built in Airtable tracking 10 clients with Enrollment Status (In Progress, Enrolled, Completed), Amount Paid, Balance Remaining, and Program Start Date. Total paid: $5,750 with $2,100 outstanding — giving the coach a full financial and enrollment snapshot at a glance.
Notion
05 / 07
Personal To-Do List System
A Notion weekly to-do system with day-by-day task columns (Monday–Sunday), a mini calendar, a live clock widget, and a Weekly Goals checklist. Tasks are tracked as checkbox items with completion status visible, enabling a clean daily planning and accountability routine.
monday.com
06 / 07
Project Management — Zeta Academy Launch Plan
A monday.com Kanban board managing the Zeta Academy course launch across four status columns: Done, In Progress, Not Started, and Stuck. Tasks include Market Research, Brand Messaging, Course Content Review, PR Announcements, and 10 more. Each card shows priority level (High/Medium), channel assignment, and subtask counts — keeping a 14-task launch plan fully visible and moving.
Notion
07 / 07
Project Management — Projects & Task Planning
A Notion workspace with a Projects Database (Kanban view: In Progress, Not Started, Done) and a Task Database beneath. Projects include Project Pilo, Xavi, and Zeta with date ranges, status tags, and linked task lists. Tabs allow filtering by All Projects, Not Started, In Progress, and Done — giving complete lifecycle oversight from project intake to completion.
